title: WAIC 2026 闭幕全景——AI 正式进入「交付元年」，从参数竞赛到交付兑现的四大趋势
title_en: WAIC 2026 Full Panorama — AI Enters the 'Year of Delivery': From Parameter Competition to Value Delivery, Four Defining Trends
summary: WAIC 2026 于 7 月 20 日在上海闭幕，主题「智能伙伴共创未来」。本文从四大趋势深度剖析 AI 产业从参数竞赛到交付兑现的转折点，涵盖具身智能、智能体手机、十万卡算力、Token 经济等核心议题。
summary_en: WAIC 2026 concluded on July 20 in Shanghai with the theme 'Intelligent Partners, Co-creating the Future.' This article provides deep analysis of AI's inflection point from parameter competition to value delivery, covering embodied AI, agent phones, ExaFLOPS computing, and the Token economy.
